  "complexity_notes": "Overall structure is moderately complex: includes async DB access (SQLAlchemy AsyncSession), JWT authentication, CRUD endpoints, and a WebSocket broadcast system. Runtime complexity is mainly in list pagination query execution (database-side filtering/search; page retrieval is O(page_size) for ORM results) and in WebSocket broadcast (O(n_subscribers) per broadcast). ConnectionManager uses in-memory per-project lists and removes disconnected sockets on failure. Potential correctness/performance considerations: list_projects total-count logic appears to use a subquery approach that may be fragile depending on SQLAlchemy behavior; status/search filters rely on SQL expressions with ILIKE. Also, a catch-all Exception handler and WebSocket broad exception handling may hide underlying issues."
